title: Monsoon Moist Dutch Green Olives Paella
description: Savory Dutch paella dish featuring green olives, perfect for a monsoon evening, whisked to perfection without eggs, this crumbly paella is a delight to taste.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper, and whisk for 1 minute.
Add the Arborio rice and whisk for 2 minutes, until the rice is coated with the spice mixture.
Add the vegetable broth, 1 cup at a time, whisking continuously and allowing each cup to be absorbed before adding the next.
After 20 minutes of cooking, stir in the green olives.
Continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes, until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with additional green olives if desired.
